en_title: Call of Duty: Black Ops 1 and 2 Support Crossplay Between PS4 and PS5, Activision Confirms
cn_title: 《使命召唤：黑色行动1、2》确认支持PS4与PS5跨平台联机
subtitle: 迟来的联机确认
opus_summary: 动视确认，PS4与PS5版《黑色行动1、2》支持两代PlayStation主机互相匹配，多人联机不支持PS3或其他平台；季票玩家也能与非季票玩家匹配。两款游戏已登顶PlayStation Store畅销榜。

paragraphs.en: Activision has clarified that its recently released Call of Duty: Black Ops 1 and 2 ports do in fact support crossplay between PS4 and PS5, following confusion from players online.
paragraphs.cn: 动视澄清，近日推出的《使命召唤：黑色行动1、2》移植版确实支持PS4与PS5跨平台联机，此前玩家在网上对此产生了疑惑。

paragraphs.en: The official Call of Duty Update X/Twitter account confirmed how the feature works amid a flurry of posts from fans across social media. It comes with clarification that those across both PlayStation platforms will be able to play multiplayer with one another, while also sharing that Season Pass owners can matchmake with non-Season Pass owners, too.
paragraphs.cn: 《使命召唤》官方Call of Duty Update X账号在社交媒体上大量玩家发帖之际，确认了该功能的运作方式。两种PlayStation平台的玩家可以互相进行多人游戏；此外，季票持有者也能与非季票持有者匹配。

paragraphs.en: "PS4 and PS5 players are able to matchmake with one another," Activision said. "There is no cross-platform play with PS3 or other hardware platforms."
paragraphs.cn: 动视表示：「PS4和PS5玩家可以互相匹配。PS3或其他硬件平台之间不支持跨平台联机。」

paragraphs.en: 📢 Call of Duty: #BlackOps & #BlackOps2 on PS4 / PS5
paragraphs.cn: 📢 PS4/PS5版《使命召唤：黑色行动》和《黑色行动2》

paragraphs.en: PS4 and PS5 players are able to matchmake with one another. There is no cross-platform play with PS3 or other hardware platforms.
paragraphs.cn: PS4和PS5玩家可以互相匹配。PS3或其他硬件平台之间不支持跨平台联机。

paragraphs.en: Also, Season Pass owners are able to matchmake with non-Season Pass owners in both titles.
paragraphs.cn: 此外，两款游戏的季票持有者都能与非季票持有者匹配。

paragraphs.en: When the publisher announced Iron Galaxy was developing PlayStation ports for the classic Black Ops games with plans to launch in July, fans didn't know what to expect. With so little information to go off of, it wasn't a shock to see disappointment sweep across the internet when the titles surprise-launched last week.
paragraphs.cn: 发行商宣布Iron Galaxy正在开发经典《黑色行动》游戏的PlayStation移植版，并计划于7月推出时，粉丝并不知道该期待什么。由于此前信息极少，上周游戏突然发售后，失望情绪席卷互联网并不令人意外。

paragraphs.en: A low frame-rate cap and low resolution baffled fans and tech experts alike , but most were even more concerned by what appeared to be a lack of crossplay support between the new versions. Although fans would have been happy to see Activision confirm crossplay from the get-go, news that it is indeed supported in some capacity is better late than never.
paragraphs.cn: 低帧率上限和低分辨率让粉丝与技术专家都感到困惑，但大多数人更担心新版本似乎不支持跨平台联机。虽然粉丝当然希望动视从一开始就确认跨平台联机，但至少如今得知它以某种形式得到支持，也算聊胜于无。

paragraphs.en: Even as players criticize what have been dubbed bare-bones ports for the two 2010s Call of Duty games, it doesn't seem to have stopped fans from flocking to the new re-releases. Despite little information being shared pre-launch, both Black Ops 1 and 2 quickly rocketed to the top of the PlayStation Store's "Best Selling" tab. Each game is available for $39.99 (or $19.99 as a limited-time offer with PlayStation Plus), with their DLC priced at $29.99 each ($9.89 for PS+).
paragraphs.cn: 尽管玩家批评这两款2010年代《使命召唤》游戏的移植版「简陋至极」，这似乎并未阻止粉丝涌向新发售的版本。即便发售前几乎没有公布信息，《黑色行动1、2》仍迅速登上PlayStation Store「畅销」榜首。每款游戏售价39.99美元(约合人民币271元)，PlayStation Plus限时优惠价19.99美元(约合人民币136元)；DLC每份29.99美元(约合人民币203元)，PS+优惠价9.89美元(约合人民币67元)。

paragraphs.en: As Black Ops 1 and 2 take players on a trip down memory lane, Activision is charging forward with the first-person shooter series' next installment, Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 . For more, you can check out IGN's original 8.5/10 review of Black Ops 1, and our 9.3/10 review of Black Ops 2.
paragraphs.cn: 《黑色行动1、2》带玩家重温往日时光之际，动视正推动这款第一人称射击系列的下一部作品《使命召唤：现代战争4》向前发展。更多内容可查看IGN对《黑色行动1》的8.5/10评测，以及对《黑色行动2》的9.3/10评测。
